title: clerodendrum tomentosum
intro: Clerodendrum tomentosum, also known as the tree glorybower, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum tomentosum include its ability to treat fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum tomentosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
